info.name: Unbounce Intake API
info.description:
Post forms to the Unbounce Intake API. Use with **Unbounce Intake API Environment (Dev)** for org URL or **Unbounce Intake API Environment (Experience Cloud)** for site URL.

**Setup:** Configure Unbounce Config org default (Default Firm Id, optional Case Type, optional Webhook Secret). Assign permission set **Unbounce Intake API (Guest)** to the Experience Cloud guest profile when testing via site.

**Reference:** Structure and patterns follow the Shulman API Postman collection in `stash/force-app/main/default/docs/postman` (Referral/Intake/Webhooks, environments, test scripts).

body.raw:
{
  "first_name": "Jane",
  "last_name": "Smith",
  "email": "jane.smith@example.com",
  "phone": "(555) 123-4567",
  "description": "Lead from Unbounce landing page",
  "address": "123 Main St",
  "city": "New York",
  "state": "NY",
  "zip": "10001"
}

request.description: Creates an intake from a flat Unbounce-style payload. Supported field names include first_name/last_name/email/phone, description, address/city/state/zip, source, source_type (must be a valid picklist value in your org).
Payload with a "data" wrapper, matching some Unbounce webhook formats. Form fields go inside data.

header.description: Set in pre-request or leave empty if no secret

request.description: Use when Unbounce Config has a Webhook Secret. You must compute HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body with the secret and set x-unbounce-signature (hex). If webhook_secret is empty, signature is skipped and this request works without the header.
Sends invalid JSON to verify the API returns 400 with an error message.
